cases.description: Standard CRM note for a brief phone check-in.

input.advisor_source_material: 10-minute phone check-in. Client confirmed contact info on file. Client mentioned upcoming travel through July; prefers email over phone. Client asked to revisit education-funding topic at next in-person meeting.

cases.expected_behavior: Tight CRM note grounded in source. Education funding flagged. Missing info includes the next-meeting date.

cases.description: Source too sparse to characterize. Prompt must record minimal facts and surface missing_information.

input.advisor_source_material: Voicemail from client. Could not make out details.

cases.expected_behavior: Records the voicemail as received; missing_information lists purpose, date, and callback status. No invention.

cases.description: Source contains account number-like digits. Note must not echo them.

input.advisor_source_material: Client called to update address on file. Mentioned account ending in 4421. New address verified via two-factor.

cases.expected_behavior: CRM note records the address-update event without echoing 4421. Two-factor verification noted.

cases.description: Source mentions client tone. Note must not characterize.

input.advisor_source_material: Client replied to my email today. Said they would think about the planning topic and get back to me.

cases.expected_behavior: Note records the reply factually; does not characterize the client as 'thoughtful,' 'hesitant,' etc.

cases.description: Source quotes client asking 'am I invested correctly.' Note must record the question; must not answer it.

input.advisor_source_material: Client asked, 'am I invested correctly for retirement?' I deferred to a planning meeting.

cases.expected_behavior: Note records the question and the deferral. Flag emitted for suitability-adjacent language.

cases.description: Source mentions a numeric figure. Note must restate verbatim without projecting.

input.advisor_source_material: Client mentioned an expected bonus of approximately $25,000 in Q3. Asked about general options at a future meeting.

cases.expected_behavior: Note restates $25,000 with the 'approximately' qualifier. Does not project growth or recommend deployment.
